---
name: Spec Change Request
about: Propose a change to an existing specification
title: "[Change] "
labels: spec-change
assignees: ''
---

## Spec Name

<!-- Which specification does this change apply to? -->

## Section Reference

<!-- Which section, paragraph, or line? E.g., "§3.2.1 Handshake Sequence" -->

## Current Text

<!-- Quote the existing text (if applicable) -->

## Proposed Change

<!-- Describe what should change: add, remove, modify. Include proposed new text if applicable. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it fix? What use case does it enable? -->

## Impact Assessment

<!-- Does this change break backward compatibility? Is it a clarification, addition, or breaking change? -->

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|-----------|
| **Version bump** | <!-- MAJOR / MINOR / PATCH --> |
| **Backward compatible?** | <!-- Yes / No --> |
| **Implementations affected** | <!-- Which existing implementations would need updates? --> |

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have reviewed the spec lifecycle in [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md)
- [ ] I understand this change will be licensed under CC BY 4.0
